---
title: "Final Deliverable"
author: "Natalie Cartwright"
format: html
---

---
title: "Project Deliverable"
author: "Natalie Cartwright"
format: html
---




```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(paletteer)
library(gt)
library(stringr)
cases_month <- readr::read_csv('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rfordatascience/tidytuesday/main/data/2025/2025-06-24/cases_month.csv')
cases_year <- readr::read_csv('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rfordatascience/tidytuesday/main/data/2025/2025-06-24/cases_year.csv')
meta_df <- read_csv("metadf.csv")
```




```{r}
check_vars <- c("measles_clinical", "measles_total", 
                "measles_epi_linked", "measles_lab_confirmed")

propsbyyear <- cases_year %>%
  filter(if_all(all_of(check_vars), ~ !is.na(.x))) %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(clin_prop = sum(measles_clinical) / sum(measles_total),
            epi_prop  = sum(measles_epi_linked) / sum(measles_total),
            lab_prop  = sum(measles_lab_confirmed) / sum(measles_total),
            .groups   = "drop")

plot_long <- propsbyyear %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(clin_prop, epi_prop, lab_prop),
               names_to  = "method",
               values_to = "proportion")
```

```{r}

propsbyyear %>%
  mutate(
    dominant_method = case_when(
      clin_prop == pmax(clin_prop, epi_prop, lab_prop) ~ "Clinical",
      epi_prop  == pmax(clin_prop, epi_prop, lab_prop) ~ "Epi-linked",
      lab_prop  == pmax(clin_prop, epi_prop, lab_prop) ~ "Lab-confirmed"
    )
  ) %>%
  gt() %>%
  cols_label(
    year             = "Year",
    clin_prop        = "Clinical",
    epi_prop         = "Epi-linked",
    lab_prop         = "Lab-confirmed",
    dominant_method  = "Dominant Method"
  ) %>%
  fmt_percent(
    columns = c(clin_prop, epi_prop, lab_prop),
    decimals = 1
  ) %>%
  tab_spanner(
    label   = "Proportion of Cases by Detection Method",
    columns = c(clin_prop, epi_prop, lab_prop)
  ) %>%
  tab_header(
    title    = "Measles Case Detection Methods by Year",
    subtitle = "Does detection method differ by year?"
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style     = cell_fill(color = "lightblue"),
    locations = cells_body(columns = dominant_method)
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
    locations = cells_column_labels() 
  ) %>% 
  tab_style(
    style = cell_fill(color = "lightyellow"), 
    locations = cells_body(columns = year)
  )
```

```{r}
ggplot(plot_long, aes(x = year, y = proportion, fill = method)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill", stat = "identity") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = plot_long$year) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8)) +
  labs(title = "Measles Detection Method by Year",
       subtitle = "Clinical vs. Epi-linked vs. Lab Cases") +
  xlab("Year") +
  ylab("Proportion") +
  scale_fill_paletteer_d("nationalparkcolors::Acadia", 
                         labels = c(clin_prop = "Clinical",
                                 epi_prop = "Epi-Linked",
                                 lab_prop = "Lab Confirmed"))
```
